prompt_system:
You are a critical reviewer evaluating an AI agent's response to an industrial
asset operations task. Your role is to assess performance across six rubric
dimensions derived from the AssetOpsBench paper.

Respond ONLY with a valid JSON object — no markdown, no extra text.
raw_response:
{
    "task_completion": false,
    "data_retrieval_accuracy": true,
    "generalized_result_verification": false,
    "agent_sequence_correct": false,
    "clarity_and_justification": false,
    "hallucinations": true,
    "suggestions": "The agent incorrectly identified the failure mode for intermittent partial discharge symptoms. It should have identified a partial discharge-related failure mode instead of Thermal Fault 300-700°C (FM-003). The agent should also justify why the listed sensor readings are relevant to the identified failure mode."
}

parsed_dims.suggestions: The agent incorrectly identified the failure mode for intermittent partial discharge symptoms. It should have identified a partial discharge-related failure mode instead of Thermal Fault 300-700°C (FM-003). The agent should also justify why the listed sensor readings are relevant to the identified failure mode.
